properties.comment: English language file for xml2bib https://github.com/nlct/texjavahelp GPL-3.0 Nicola Talbot
properties.entry: {0} (or {1}) <dir> The directory containing all the hellpset files
{0} (or {1}) <locale-list> The list of supported locales (cumulative). Omit if no locale sub-directories.
{0} (or {1}) <prefix> The prefix used for the locale sub-directories.
Only one input directory and output file permitted
